message: program exits while a verifier-tracked socket reference is still live
required_proof: after bpf_skc_lookup_tcp returns a non-null socket, every possible exit path must release the same reference with bpf_sk_release

related_spans.label: socket assigned before the leaking branch
reference released only on the non-early-return path

evidence.detail: Unreleased reference is reported at exit after the socket lookup helper
the marked-packet branch reaches BPF_EXIT with the socket lookup ref still present in the refs set
the successful bpf_sk_assign and mark branch returns before bpf_sk_release

help: Release the socket returned by bpf_skc_lookup_tcp on every path after a successful lookup; the marked-packet return path should call bpf_sk_release before returning or route through shared cleanup.
